description: Tests whether brightfield_cells_nuclei model detects cells on DAB-negative (blue-only) tissue. Tiles classified by percentage of tissue pixels with DAB concentration > 0.1 (after stain deconvolution). Low detection ratio on negative tissue confirms CLDN18.2 specificity.

method.tissue_mask: Otsu threshold on grayscale (tissue = dark pixels)

detail: On negative tissue, ratio=0.403 (44.1 vs 109.2). On high-DAB tissue, ratio=0.560. The model does NOT show strong DAB selectivity.
